message:
feat(web): add form body size limit and comprehensive extractor tests

Harden web extractors with payload size enforcement and edge case
coverage:

- Add MAX_FORM_BODY_SIZE (2 MiB) constant and enforce payload-size
  check on Form extraction, returning 413 Payload Too Large
- Add 10 new tests: form body too large, JSON body too large, form
  wrong content-type, form invalid UTF-8, JSON invalid body, empty
  query string, percent-encoded query values, multi-param path
  extraction, empty raw body, and extraction error-to-response
  conversion

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
